events.title: US and Iran Sign Interim Deal to End War
events.desc: The United States and Iran have signed an interim agreement to end their prolonged conflict. The deal, which includes provisions for the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, was announced by US President Donald Trump. Details remain vague, and the full implications are yet to be seen, but the agreement signals a significant de-escalation.

events.title: G7 Leaders Meet to Discuss Iran and Ukraine
events.desc: Leaders of the G7 nations are convening in France, with discussions heavily focused on the ongoing conflict with Iran and the situation in Ukraine. French President Emmanuel Macron indicated that reopening the Strait of Hormuz would be a key topic, alongside concerns about Iran's nuclear program.

events.title: Iran Executes Two for 2026 Unrest
events.desc: Iran has executed two individuals identified as 'armed leaders of early 2026 unrest' in the city of Shahrud. The judiciary's news outlet Mizan reported that the men, Javad Zamani and Abolfazl Saedi, were convicted of serious charges including 'waging war against God' and crimes against national security.

events.title: Israeli Airstrikes in Southern Lebanon
events.desc: Reports indicate that Israeli air strikes have targeted southern Lebanon, including the city of Tyre, despite warnings from Iran. These strikes have resulted in casualties, with at least 17 people reportedly killed in the town of Tayr Debba.

events.title: Hezbollah Targets Struck in Beirut by Israel
events.desc: The Israeli military announced it had struck targets belonging to the Iran-backed group Hezbollah in Beirut. This action occurred as Tehran warned that such strikes could jeopardize the recently announced US-Iran deal to end the wider conflict.

events.title: Three Indian Sailors Killed in US Strike on Oil Tanker
events.desc: The US military has confirmed the deaths of three Indian sailors following an attack on a Palau-flagged oil tanker. The US stated the strike was a result of the tanker not complying with directions near the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: US Air Force B-52 Bomber Crashes
events.desc: An eight-member crew was killed when a US Air Force B-52 bomber crashed during a routine test mission in California. The exact cause of the crash is under investigation.

events.title: Iran Issues Statement on Israeli Occupation in Lebanon
events.desc: Iran has declared that any continued Israeli occupation in Lebanon would constitute a breach of the Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) signed with the United States. This statement adds a layer of complexity to the fragile peace agreement.

events.title: US Navy Uses Iranian Smuggling Tactic for Oil Exports
events.desc: The United States military has reportedly employed a ship-to-ship oil transfer tactic, similar to methods used by Iran, to facilitate oil exports from the Gulf. This operation involved the use of drones and helicopters to guide tankers.

events.title: Russian Grain Smuggling to Libya Tracked
events.desc: An investigation using AIS data has tracked the movement of a bulk carrier, the Grumant, from occupied Ukrainian territory to Libya, allegedly involved in grain smuggling. This highlights ongoing illicit trade activities.

events.title: Ongoing Demolitions in Southern Lebanon
events.desc: Despite a fragile ceasefire, satellite imagery reveals extensive demolitions across southern Lebanon. At least 46 out of 54 towns and villages within the Israel Defense Forces' 'Yellow Line' have suffered heavy damage, with some being completely flattened.

events.title: Damaged Police Infrastructure in Iran
events.desc: In the initial three weeks of the US and Israeli war against Iran, at least 80 police stations and related infrastructure have been damaged or destroyed. This campaign appears aimed at degrading the Iranian regime's repressive capabilities.

events.title: Russian Submunitions Found in Mali
events.desc: Unexploded Russian-made cluster munition bomblets have been discovered in northern Mali, raising concerns as the country is a state party to the Convention on Cluster Munitions. This discovery follows Mali's announcement of airstrikes.

events.title: US-Iran Hostilities Intensify
events.desc: Hostilities between the US and Iran have notably increased, ending a recent truce. Fighting has intensified between Israel and Hezbollah, with direct strikes traded between Iran and Israel on June 7. Iran has linked these actions to ongoing US-Iranian negotiations.

events.title: Lebanese Armed Forces Slow Progress on Disarmament
events.desc: The Lebanese Armed Forces have made slow progress in their plan to disarm Hezbollah, partly due to fears of internal splintering. Meanwhile, Israeli attacks continue, complicating efforts towards a stable ceasefire.
